description: Federal requirements that apply in ALL states

socialSecurityCard.notes: Free. Can request online with my Social Security account or in-person at SSA office. Many returning citizens need to visit in person if they don't have online access.

snap.name: SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program)
snap.description: Monthly food benefits on EBT card

federalEligibility.convictionRestrictions: Drug trafficking felony conviction after 8/22/1996 — states may opt out of this ban
federalEligibility.workRequirements: ABAWDs (Able-Bodied Adults Without Dependents) ages 18-52: must work 80hrs/month or lose benefits after 3 months in 36-month period

federalEligibility.convictionRestrictions: None — Medicaid cannot deny based on criminal history
federalEligibility.notes: Most states auto-qualify returning citizens. Apply immediately upon release.

ssi.name: Supplemental Security Income
ssi.description: Monthly cash for disabled/elderly with limited income

federalEligibility.convictionRestrictions: Cannot receive while incarcerated. Must reapply upon release. Outstanding warrants may affect eligibility.
federalEligibility.notes: Apply at SSA office. Can take 3-6 months for disability determination. Apply immediately.

federalEligibility.benefit: Free phone with minutes/data from participating carriers

pellGrant.name: Federal Pell Grant
pellGrant.description: College/vocational training financial aid — no repayment

federalEligibility.convictionRestrictions: FAFSA Simplification Act (2024) removed incarceration question. All returning citizens eligible.
federalEligibility.notes: Major policy change — previously incarcerated students were banned. Now fully eligible. Apply via FAFSA.

federalSupervision.checkInFrequency: As directed by probation officer — typically monthly
federalSupervision.travelRestrictions: Must get permission from USPO for any travel outside district
federalSupervision.specialConditions: May include substance abuse treatment, mental health treatment, employment requirement, computer monitoring
